programmes.show_description: Action thriller with Henry Cavill. A police officer and a vigilante are caught up in a dangerous scheme involving a troubled, recently-arrested man who is linked to years of female abductions.
Spy thriller with Michael Caine. An MI6 defector has his appearance altered by the KGB and is sent back to steal documents - but decides to play both sides against each other for his own gain.

Alleged slander, toxic trash and a major disagreement over property lines come into play when neighbours go after each other.
A gambler wins a seven-day cruise, but makes the very wrong choice in travelling companions and claims she was left stranded in Miami.
A woman claims she was falsely arrested for domestic violence and explains how her boyfriend got his scratches.
When alcohol and alleged idiocy come into play, the Judge reminds litigants that lunch is right around the corner if they can't prove their case.
A man's story changes when he describes damages to his beloved Harley and the allegedly shoddy care taken by a mechanic.
A man and woman meet online and opt for a business rather than romantic relationship; she accuses him of inappropriate behaviour.
After allegedly being spat on, a woman sprays her neighbour in the face and says the baby she was holding was collateral damage.
A young man insists that he was doing his landlord a favour by ripping out all her kitchen appliances shortly before he moved out.
A woman claims her nephew shot her in the head with a BB gun; her sister claims she broke in and stole her belongings.

A wealthy lawyer shoots his wife from the backseat of a car - was it a tragic accident or cold-blooded murder?
An NHS manager cooks up a scam with his mates to line their pockets with two hundred and fifty thousand pounds.
In December 2000, Mike Williams headed out onto the lake to hunt for ducks and never returned. It was believed he drowned and was eaten by alligators.
A Violent Night: In this programme, each episode reveals a new murder in which the killer or victim lived a life of luxury and wealth.

After being chased on horseback by a mysterious and terrifying figure dressed in black hours before her engagement, a woman faces the biggest decision of her life.
As a spy is about to be hanged, the rope breaks and he falls to the water below. Finally free, he races home - and learns the terrible truth of his future.
Action adventure based on Michael Crichton's novel, with Dylan Walsh. A team of explorers looking for King Solomon's diamond mines in the jungles of the Congo disappears without trace.
Western with Sam Worthington. An outlaw learns of a prophecy that claims one of his estranged children will kill him, and decides to hunt down each of them and end the curse.
Crime thriller with Sylvester Stallone. After suffering a brain injury, the only surviving thief from a bank heist is given an experimental drug to rebuild his memory and help crack the case.
Sci-fi sequel with Patrick Bergin. Computerised megalomaniac Jobe returns in a bid to take over the world from cyberspace, and only a youngster and a scientist stand in his way.

After receiving a large settlement cheque, a woman purchases breast augmentation surgery and is cared for by a friend. They then fight over a loan.
A woman admits that she promised to pay for her incarcerated son's property damage; when she changes her mind, her Harley is towed by his ex-roommate.
A couple shell out $4,000 to a man for a mobile home only to discover that he doesn't even own the trailer and has allegedly sold it more than once.
When the Judge realises that a fight over a used Mercedes Benz lacks critical evidence, she reminds lax litigants that she has better things to do.
A young woman plans a cruise with her mother only to have the trip cancelled; she is accused of pocketing the refund and going on a cruise with her aunt.
A woman accuses her ex-lover of destroying over $2,000 worth of clothing in an alleged fit of jealousy.
When an executive closes her company, she illegally leases her space to another businesswoman who also closes her company.
After a neighbourhood catfight breaks out, the Judge must decide how injuries were inflicted when both women deny placing their hands on each other.
When an unleashed Pit Bull confronts a woman and her dog, she claims her pet defended her and took the brunt of the vicious attack.

An accounts worker at a cancer hospital syphons off six hundred and forty-two thousand pounds of NHS money.
A manager treats the NHS like a cash machine. An organised crime gang try to swindle thirteen million pounds.
Samira was a fashion model in Paris when she met Adam Frasch. In 2014, Samira's handyman arrives to their home and is horrified to find Samira dead in the family pool.

An inquisitive newspaper columnist interviews glamourous movie star Pamela Morris at her lavish mansion, hoping to find the key to her apparent immortality.
An irritable taxi driver insults his TV repairman, and is later horrified to see secrets from his private life - and their horrific consequences - revealed on his TV set.
Crime thriller with Christian Slater. Notorious gangsters Bugsy Siegel and Lucky Luciano make a daring bid to overthrow the dons of Twenties New York.
Tense action thriller with John Cena. A New Orleans detective must complete a series of dangerous games to rescue his kidnapped girlfriend from a vengeful criminal mastermind.
